utterance:
{
  "utterance": "We're building a platform that turns your daily habits into profitable side gigs, turning ordinary people into modern-day entrepreneurs. With HabitHive, you can monetize your skills and interests in minutes, all while staying true to your passions.",
  "title": "HabitHive",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "HabitHive uniquely combines personal habit tracking with monetization opportunities, providing a seamless way for individuals to turn their daily activities into income streams.",
  "your_role": "PM/Visionary, Presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "Harnessing wireless energy for global access to clean power, transforming lives through resonance and frequency.",
  "title": "Resonant Energy Network",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "This project leverages Tesla's principles of wireless energy transmission to provide clean, limitless power to underserved communities, addressing environmental and social justice issues.",
  "your_role": "Chief Scientist"
}

{
  "utterance": "Empower the voice of the unheard through a decentralized platform that ensures every citizen’s opinion is heard and valued, ensuring a more just and equitable society.",
  "title": "VoiceOfThePeople",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "VoiceOfThePeople is unique because it leverages blockchain technology to create a decentralized voting system that guarantees transparency, security, and equal representation for all citizens, addressing issues of corruption and disenfranchisement.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Imagine an app that reads your dreams and projects them onto the physical world, blurring the lines between reality and the subconscious. This is not just an app; it's a portal to the collective unconscious.",
  "title": "Dreamscapes Projector",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "The Dreamscapes Projector combines the surreal and the technological to create a unique, immersive experience that challenges perceptions of reality and the subconscious mind.",
  "your_role": "Visionary and Spiritual Leader"
}
